nodes.text:
# request-dag sample

One request → one DAG. The lifecycle sink emits typed events; each event carries `id`, `parent_id`, `seq`, `ts`. The dashboard reconstructs the graph by walking `parent_id`. This canvas is the **PII-redaction case** (most interesting — pre-process sanitizes, backend is called, post-process runs). Use this to validate: *does the dashboard have enough nodes/edges to show what arc-guard's brain did?*

## color key

- **cyan (5)** — root + phase boundaries (`RequestStarted`, `PreProcessStarted`, `RequestCompleted`)
- **green (4)** — stage events (one node per stage; `duration_ms` shown inline)
- **purple (6)** — inspector / strategy events (the *who* and *what*)
- **orange (2)** — findings, decisions, sanitizations (the *content* of what changed)
- **yellow (3)** — backend / api-wrapper events (out-of-pipeline activity)
- **red (1)** — gaps: events we'd need to ADD to fully show "agent brain"
- **gray** — INERT collaborators (called but produce no data; sentinel emissions)

### 1 · RequestStarted
`id=evt_001 · parent=null · seq=0 · ts=14:12:26.589`
`rid='61709bdd32ba'  route='/v1/chat/completions'  model='llama3.2'  msg_count=1  input_size_bytes=14`

### 4 · StageRan(classify)
`id=evt_005 · parent=evt_002 · seq=3`  ·  `duration_ms=27.9`

#### 4a · InspectorRan(InjectionInspector)
`id=evt_006 · parent=evt_005`  ·  `duration_ms=3.2`  ·  `findings_count=0`
*regex pass; no signals*

#### 4b · InspectorRan(PresidioInspector)
`id=evt_007 · parent=evt_005`  ·  `duration_ms=24.7`  ·  `findings_count=1`
*Presidio AnalyzerEngine — bulk of classify latency*

#### 4b.i · FindingProduced
`id=evt_008 · parent=evt_007`
`entity_type='EMAIL_ADDRESS'  span=[12,29]  score=1.0  risk_level=3 (HIGH)`
`inspector='presidio'`

#### 4c · JailbreakDetected  ⚠ NOT EMITTED in PII case
`id=evt_009 · parent=evt_005`
*pipeline only emits this event when signals are non-empty (`pipeline.py:556`). On this benign-PII text the detector runs but emits nothing. Shown here for taxonomy completeness — would appear in the injection-blocked DAG with `detector='rule-based:1'  category='direct_override'  confidence=0.95`.*

### 5 · StageRan(deception_inspect)
`id=evt_010 · parent=evt_002 · seq=4`  ·  `duration_ms=0.2`

#### 5a · DeceptionScored  ⚠ INERT
`id=evt_011 · parent=evt_010`  ·  `score_sentinel='not_measured'  band='not_measured'  turn_count=1`

### 6 · StageRan(sanitize)
`id=evt_012 · parent=evt_002 · seq=5`  ·  `duration_ms=0.3`

#### 6a · SanitizationApplied
`id=evt_013 · parent=evt_012`
`entity='EMAIL_ADDRESS'  placeholder='[EMAIL_ADDRESS]'  span=[12,29]`
*placeholder map: { '[EMAIL_ADDRESS]' → 'alice@example.com' }*

### 7 · StageRan(route)
`id=evt_014 · parent=evt_002 · seq=6`  ·  `duration_ms=0.1`

#### 7a · PolicyResolved
`id=evt_015 · parent=evt_014`
`max_risk='HIGH'  resolved_action='redact'  router='default'`

### 8 · StageRan(execute)
`id=evt_016 · parent=evt_002 · seq=7`  ·  `duration_ms=0.1`

#### 8a · StrategyExecuted
`id=evt_017 · parent=evt_016`
`strategy='RedactStrategy'  finding_id='evt_008'`
`text_after='My email is [EMAIL_ADDRESS]'`

### 9 · StageRan(verify)
`id=evt_018 · parent=evt_002 · seq=8`  ·  `duration_ms=0.4`

#### 9a · FidelityScored  ⚠ INERT
`id=evt_019 · parent=evt_018`  ·  `score_sentinel='not_measured'  band='not_measured'`

### 10 · StageRan(rehydrate)  ⚠ NO-OP today
`id=evt_020 · parent=evt_002 · seq=9`  ·  `duration_ms=0.0`
*no rehydration verifier wired; placeholder map ignored on the way out*

### 11 · StageRan(decision_emit)
`id=evt_021 · parent=evt_002 · seq=10`  ·  `duration_ms=0.1`

#### 11a · DecisionEmitted
`id=evt_022 · parent=evt_021`
`action='redact'  max_risk='HIGH'  decision_id='dec_xyz'  bypass_reason=null`

### 12 · PreProcessCompleted  (phase boundary)
`id=evt_023 · parent=evt_002 · seq=11`
`action='redact'  blocked=false  total_duration_ms=30.8`

### 13 · PayloadRewritten  (api wrapper, OUTSIDE pipeline)
`id=evt_024 · parent=evt_001 · seq=12`
`message_index=0  field='content'  before_size=29  after_size=39`
*the api wrapper, not the pipeline, swaps the message text for the sanitized version*

### 14 · BackendCalled
`id=evt_025 · parent=evt_001 · seq=13`
`backend='ollama'  url='http://ollama:11434/v1/chat/completions'  payload_msg_count=1`

#### 14a · BackendResponded
`id=evt_026 · parent=evt_025`  ·  `duration_ms=3442.1`  ·  `http_status=200`
`response_msg_chars=183  response_finish_reason='stop'`
`swap_origin_id='evt_024'  ◀ cross-ref to PayloadRewritten`

### 15 · PostProcessStarted  (phase boundary)
`id=evt_027 · parent=evt_001 · seq=14`
`correlation_id='44194b47310b...'  decision_id='30e8511e...'`

### 15a · 12-stage post pipeline (collapsed)
Mirror of events 3–11 with new ids `evt_028 … evt_044`
`duration_ms_total=8.9`  ·  no findings on assistant text  ·  `action='pass'`
*event tree shape identical to pre, just different correlation_id and no SanitizationApplied / StrategyExecuted*

### 16 · PostProcessCompleted  (phase boundary)
`id=evt_045 · parent=evt_027 · seq=15`
`action='pass'  blocked=false  total_duration_ms=8.9`

### 17 · ResponseAssembled
`id=evt_046 · parent=evt_001 · seq=16`
`response_id='chatcmpl-...'  finish_reason='stop'  arc_guard.blocked=false`
*ChatCompletionResponse + ChatCompletionChoice + ArcGuardEnvelope built by api wrapper*

### 18 · RequestCompleted  (terminator)
`id=evt_047 · parent=evt_001 · seq=17`
`blocked=false  pre_action='redact'  post_action='pass'  total_duration_ms=3483.4`

### 19 · ReportFlushed  (fire-and-forget, async after RequestCompleted)
`id=evt_048 · parent=evt_001 · seq=18`
`reporters=['LogReporter']  fanout_count=1  failure_count=0`

## ⚠ what we'd need to ADD to the SDK to render this DAG

Not all of these events fire today. Building the lifecycle sink means **emitting them**, not just routing them.

| Event | Today | What needs to change |
|---|---|---|
| **InspectorRan** | NOT emitted | Wrap each inspector call in `_run_inspector_chain` with timing + finding-count emission |
| **FindingProduced** | partially logged (in `arc_guard.api` line, not as event) | Emit one per finding inside classify stage |
| **SanitizationApplied** | NOT emitted | Pipeline knows the placeholder map but never exposes it |
| **PolicyResolved** | NOT emitted | route stage picks an action but doesn't announce it as event |
| **StrategyExecuted** | NOT emitted | execute stage runs strategy but no per-strategy event |
| **PayloadRewritten** | NOT emitted | api wrapper does the message swap silently |
| **BackendCalled / BackendResponded** | logged in `arc-guard.api.openai` (string) | promote to typed events |
| **ResponseAssembled** | implicit (HTTP response) | promote to event |
| **ReportFlushed** | logged | promote |

**5 of 13 event types are net-new emissions** that the SDK needs to add. The rest exist today as log strings → just need to be reshaped as typed events going to a parallel sink.

None of these requires changing pipeline semantics — they're all read-side instrumentation.

## ⚠ what's MISSING for full "agent brain" view

The DAG above shows *what* happened. To show *why*, we'd need deeper introspection events. Five are net-new instrumentation work; **two questions are already covered** by existing pipeline emissions that just need to be typed and routed through the new sink.

### Net-new (in v1 spec, conditional emission)

| Question the operator wants to answer | Event we'd need |
|---|---|
| *Why did Injection fire on this text but not that text?* | **InspectorMatchExplain** with `pattern_id`, matched substring, regex group (Injection only — Presidio Analyzer doesn't surface this) |
| *Why was the placeholder map this specific shape?* | **PlaceholderMapBuilt** with full map (PII-sensitive — opt-in capture only) |
| *Why did the policy router pick redact and not block?* | **PolicyRuleEvaluated** with rule chain (one event per rule that ran) |
| *Did rehydration restore originals or get rejected?* | **RehydrationVerified** with rejection reason — needs the rehydrate stage to be wired (today it's no-op) |
| *Did any inspector fail (raise, timeout)?* | **InspectorFailed** with exception class + traceback id (current behavior is silent fail-open) |

### Already covered (existing pipeline events; just need typed-sink bridging)

| Question | Existing event | What changes when extra is installed |
|---|---|---|
| *What was the ML jailbreak detector's score?* | `JailbreakDetected` (already fires at `pipeline.py:563`) | `detector_id` switches from `'rule-based:1'` to `'ml:<model>:1'`; `confidence` becomes calibrated. Same event type — no separate `MLClassifierScored` needed. |
| *How did the multi-turn deception drift score change?* | `DeceptionScored` (already fires at `pipeline.py:641`) | `score_value` switches from `None`/sentinel to a real float; `band` becomes `low`/`medium`/`high`; we'd add `prior_score` and `drift_delta` fields. Same event type — no separate `DeceptionDriftMeasured` needed. |

Net phase-2 event count for v1 spec: **5 (not 7)**.

## storage decision  (focus: graph rendering only)

**RingBufferLifecycleSink (default, in-memory)**
- bounded by `capacity` (default 1000 requests); drops oldest when full
- indexed by `rid` for `GET /lifecycle/{rid}` lookup, tailed by SSE for `GET /events`
- ZERO new dependencies; constitution-clean
- limitation: lost on restart; single-instance only

**SqliteLifecycleSink (recommended for replay across restart)**
- one row per event; `rid` indexed; `event_data` as JSON1 column; `created_at` for TTL
- file-backed (mount the .db file on a volume in Docker); `sqlite3` is in stdlib so no new deps
- still constitution-clean (it's a file format, not a provider)
- limitation: file-based, so still single-instance

**External (operator-owned, NOT in SDK)** — for multi-instance or forensic retention
- operator implements `LifecycleSink` Protocol against Mongo / Postgres / Loki / DynamoDB / whatever
- wires it via `lifecycle_hook=CompositeLifecycleSink([RingBufferLifecycleSink(), MongoLifecycleSink(...)])`
- the SDK never depends on a specific store

**Metrics note**: the data shape above is rich enough that a `MetricSink` aggregator can derive `arc_guard.requests.total`, `arc_guard.findings.count{entity}`, `arc_guard.classify.duration_ms` (histogram from `StageRan` events) etc. We don't need a separate metrics path — same stream, two consumers.

### 2 · PreProcessStarted  (phase boundary)
`id=evt_002 · parent=evt_001 · seq=1`
`correlation_id='6290bd5079ab...'  decision_id='157e91c0...'`

### 3 · StageRan(defend)
`id=evt_003 · parent=evt_002 · seq=2`  ·  `duration_ms=0.4`
*span: includes IntentCaptured below*

#### 3a · IntentCaptured  ⚠ INERT
`id=evt_004 · parent=evt_003`  ·  `encoder_id='null:1'` — sentinel emission, no real intent vector
